title: Isabelle Dances Into the Spotlight
original_title: An American Girl: Isabelle Dances Into the Spotlight
overview: Isabelle is an inspired dancer, but when her sister and a classmate make her doubt herself, she's motivated by a ballerina to find her own way to shine.
